---
title: Contributing
sidebar: get-started
---

Thank you for your interest in contributing to Ammonyte! Contributions of all kinds are welcome — bug reports, feature requests, documentation improvements, and code contributions.

## Reporting a bug

If you find a bug, please open an issue on [GitHub Issues](https://github.com/LinkedEarth/Ammonyte/issues) and include:

- A short description of the problem
- A minimal code example that reproduces it
- The output or error message you see

## Suggesting a feature

Open an issue with the label `enhancement` and describe what you'd like to see and why it would be useful.

## Contributing code

1. Fork the repository and clone it locally
2. Create a new branch for your change:
   ```bash
   git checkout -b my-feature
   ```
3. Set up the development environment:
   ```bash
   conda env create -f .binder/environment.yml
   conda activate ammonyte_env
   pip install -e .
   ```
4. Make your changes and add tests if applicable
5. Run the test suite to make sure everything passes:
   ```bash
   pip install pytest
   pytest ammonyte/tests/
   ```
6. Submit a pull request against the `main` branch

## Code style

Please follow existing code conventions in the repository. Docstrings should use NumPy style.
